data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the verification timeline.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the verification timeline (pending/verified/rejected/revoked), but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations that confirm this requirement. There are no API reads or persisted state checks related to the verification timeline, leading to an inconclusive result. Without concrete evidence to support the validation of this requirement, it cannot be deemed satisfied.
gaps: No evidence confirming the verification timeline (pending/verified/rejected/revoked).

deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the verification timeline.
